response.global_analysis: 1. Reference Match: The audio matches the lookup songs 'The Biggest Dreamer' and 'Capture the Moment' perfectly, including the dramatic Indonesian/English vocal dialogue from the intermediate 3D skit. 2. Reference Usage: Fully utilized the reference lyrics and manually transcribed the central dramatic interlude with high precision. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timings are strictly tied to the onset and offset of the vocals, maintaining perfect audio-visual synchronization without cascading delays.

subtitles.original: Bigger, bigger, biggest dreamer! 夢見る ことが すべて 始まり
subtitles.english: Bigger, bigger, biggest dreamer! Dreaming is where everything begins

subtitles.original: それが 答え だろう
subtitles.english: That must be the answer

subtitles.original: 誰より 遠くへ 飛んで見せるよ
subtitles.english: I'll show you I can fly further than anyone else

subtitles.original: すべての 明日を 貫いて
subtitles.english: Piercing through all of tomorrow

subtitles.original: Bigger, bigger, biggest dreamer! 夢見る ことが すべて 始まり
subtitles.english: Bigger, bigger, biggest dreamer! Dreaming is where everything begins

subtitles.original: それが 答え だろう
subtitles.english: That must be the answer

subtitles.original: Wanna be the biggest dreamer 全力で
subtitles.english: Wanna be the biggest dreamer, with all my might

subtitles.original: 未来も 今も 駆け抜けろ
subtitles.english: Run through both the future and the present!

subtitles.original: A bomb now?
subtitles.english: A bomb now?

subtitles.original: Buset, ini sih bener-bener udah keterlaluan.
subtitles.english: Jeez, this is really getting out of hand.

subtitles.original: Harusnya sekarang aku lagi 3D Showcase, tapi malah nyasar...
subtitles.english: I'm supposed to be doing my 3D Showcase right now, but instead I got lost...

subtitles.original: ...kejebak di ruangan yang ada bomnya, terus disuruh mecahin kode morse.
subtitles.english: ...trapped in a room with a bomb, and now I have to crack a morse code?

subtitles.original: Hari ini apes banget!
subtitles.english: What a terrible day!

subtitles.original: Terus ada hape juga?
subtitles.english: And there's a phone too?

subtitles.original: Aku harus ngapain? Telepon YAGOO terus bilang aku nyasar dan perlu bantuan?
subtitles.english: What am I supposed to do? Call YAGOO and tell him I'm lost and need help?

subtitles.original: Kayaknya aku tahu harus ngapain!
subtitles.english: Wait, I think I know what to do!

subtitles.original: Ha, halo?
subtitles.english: H-hello?

subtitles.original: Aku nyasar, kejebak, terus ada bom juga.
subtitles.english: I'm lost, trapped, and there's a bomb here.

subtitles.original: Apa?
subtitles.english: What?

subtitles.original: Kalau Zany nggak bisa mecahin kode morse, bisa mampus aku.
subtitles.english: If you can't decode morse code, I'm a goner.

subtitles.original: Hah?
subtitles.english: Hah?

subtitles.original: Oke, garis titik garis, titik titik titik, titik garis, garis garis, garis garis garis, garis titik, garis titik garis garis, titik garis.
subtitles.english: Okay, dash-dot-dash, dot-dot-dot-dot, dot-dash, dash-dash, dash-dash-dash, dash-dot, dash-dot-dash-dash, dot-dash.

subtitles.original: Cepetan! Bomnya mau meledak!
subtitles.english: Hurry! The bomb is about to explode!

subtitles.original: Bisa diulang lagi nggak?
subtitles.english: Can you repeat that again?

subtitles.original: Garis titik garis, titik titik titik, titik garis, garis garis, garis garis garis, garis titik, garis titik garis garis, titik garis.
subtitles.english: Dash-dot-dash, dot-dot-dot-dot, dot-dash, dash-dash, dash-dash-dash, dash-dot, dash-dot-dash-dash, dot-dash.

subtitles.original: Chamon apaan coba?
subtitles.english: What on earth is Chamon?

subtitles.original: Jadi aku bisa mampus beneran.
subtitles.english: So I'm really going to die.

subtitles.original: Kayaknya yang terakhir Y... A...
subtitles.english: I think the last ones are Y... A...

subtitles.original: Chamonya?
subtitles.english: Chamonya?

subtitles.original: Apaan itu?
subtitles.english: What is that?

subtitles.original: Aku nggak tahu kamu ngapain, tapi semoga berhasil!
subtitles.english: I don't know what you're doing, but good luck!

subtitles.original: Makasih! Bye!
subtitles.english: Thanks! Bye!

subtitles.original: Cha, chamonya... Chachamonya?
subtitles.english: Cha, chamonya... Chachamonya?

subtitles.original: Chachamonya?
subtitles.english: Chachamonya?

subtitles.original: I really want to be with you, I really want to be with you
subtitles.english: I really want to be with you, I really want to be with you

subtitles.original: You're my love, you're my shine, you're my dear, so trust me, trust me, trust me, yeah
subtitles.english: You're my love, you're my shine, you're my dear, so trust me, trust me, trust me, yeah

subtitles.original: I'm here そばにいるから
subtitles.english: I'm here, because I'm by your side

subtitles.original: Call me 僕がいるから
subtitles.english: Call me, because I am here

subtitles.original: Trust me もう何も 恐れないで
subtitles.english: Trust me, don't fear anything anymore

subtitles.original: My dear 見えない糸で
subtitles.english: My dear, with an invisible thread

subtitles.original: Trust me 繋がっているから
subtitles.english: Trust me, because we are connected

subtitles.original: ただ感じていて この温もり
subtitles.english: Just feel this warmth

subtitles.original: ちゃんと聴こえている 君の心の声
subtitles.english: I can clearly hear the voice of your heart

subtitles.original: 小さなアンサーへ 僕が耳をあててあげる
subtitles.english: I will press my ear to your tiny answer

subtitles.original: 何度も伝えたい 君は一人じゃない
subtitles.english: I want to tell you over and over, you are not alone

subtitles.original: 変わることのない 愛はきっとここにある
subtitles.english: An unchanging love is surely right here

subtitles.original: 泣いてみればいい
subtitles.english: You can try crying

subtitles.original: 頼ってみればいい
subtitles.english: You can try relying on me

subtitles.original: その全てを受け止めると決めた
subtitles.english: I decided to accept all of it

subtitles.original: I'm here どこにいたって
subtitles.english: I'm here, no matter where you are

subtitles.original: Call me 一つになる
subtitles.english: Call me, we will become one

subtitles.original: Trust me この想い ほどけないから
subtitles.english: Trust me, because these feelings won't unravel

subtitles.original: My dear 抱えた荷物
subtitles.english: My dear, the baggage you hold

subtitles.original: Trust me 降ろしてみればいい そう君のためにも 僕がいるんだ
subtitles.english: Trust me, you can try setting it down, yes, for your sake, I am here

subtitles.original: I really want to be with you, trust me, trust me, trust me, yeah
subtitles.english: I really want to be with you, trust me, trust me, trust me, yeah

subtitles.original: どれほどの悲しみ 君は隠してたの
subtitles.english: How much sadness were you hiding?

subtitles.original: どれほどの想いを 胸に閉じ込めてきたの
subtitles.english: How many feelings have you kept locked away in your heart?

subtitles.original: 痛みと引き換えに 手に入れた強さを
subtitles.english: The strength you gained in exchange for pain

subtitles.original: いつか優しさへ 君は変えていけるはず
subtitles.english: You should be able to turn it into kindness someday

subtitles.original: 奪われたって
subtitles.english: Even if it's stolen

subtitles.original: 壊されたって
subtitles.english: Even if it's broken

subtitles.original: 大事なのは君らしくいること
subtitles.english: What's important is that you stay true to yourself

subtitles.original: I'm here たとえ世界が
subtitles.english: I'm here, even if the world

subtitles.original: Call me 終わるとしても
subtitles.english: Call me, even if it comes to an end

subtitles.original: Trust me 繋ぐ手は 離さないから My dear いつわりはない
subtitles.english: Trust me, I won't let go of your hand, My dear, there are no lies
